threat-engine-db.description: Threat Engine CSPM — PostgreSQL (9 DBs), Neo4j graph, Engine APIs (read-only)

catalog-search.description: Search CSPM rule catalog (1918+ rules) and discovery YAMLs by keyword, CSP, or service. Tools: catalog_search, catalog_count.

argo.description: Argo Workflows — submit scans, poll pipeline status, stream step logs. Tools: argo_submit, argo_status, argo_logs, argo_list. NOTE: requires argo-server.mjs to be created and ARGO_TOKEN populated.

aws-secrets.description: AWS Secrets Manager — resolve secret values by name without kubectl exec. Tools: get_secret, list_secrets. Read-only. NOTE: requires aws-secrets-server.mjs to be created.

github.description: GitHub integration for PR operations, issue tracking, repository management

kubernetes.description: Kubernetes cluster management (kubectl operations, pod logs, deployments)

zapcode.description: Figma MCP server via Zapcode Dev Mode plugin — creates/edits Figma designs
